mnemonics: Modal(ity) Matters, Message(ng) First, then Model(ing) the Response
Learn, Observe, Evaluate, and Adjust (LOEA) Cycle
keyPoints: The Learning System should be designed to accommodate individual differences in preferences and learning styles.
The learning system should be based on a clear understanding of the problem being addressed and the desired learning outcome.
The system should be designed to provide feedback and guidance throughout the learning process.
The system should be flexible and adaptable to accommodate changing needs and circumstances.
The system should be evaluated regularly to assess its effectiveness and make necessary adjustments.
